nasb.text: Say to them, ‘As I live,’ says the Lord, ‘just as you have spoken in My hearing, so I will surely do to you;

esv.text: Say to them, ‘As I live, declares the Lord, what you have said in my hearing I will do to you:

cnv.text: 你要對他們說：‘耶和華說，我指著我的永生起誓，我必照著你們所說給我聽的，對待你們：

ccb.text: 你们去把我的话告诉他们，‘以色列人啊，我凭我的永恒起誓，我必照你们所说的对待你们。
